title: Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromised in Supply Chain Attack

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromised in Supply Chain At
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/29
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*icp0.io*'
            - '*plug-tab-protective-relay.trycloudflare.com*'
            - '*scan.aquasecurtiy*'
            - '*tdtqy-oyaaa-aaaae-af2dq-cai.raw.icp0.io*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
